problem id: 161d4390
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10100111 -> 11001111
  11010000 -> 00101000
  01000111 -> 00111111
  11001100 -> 01010110
  00010110 -> 01010011
  01110110 -> 11100011
  10110101 -> 10001110
  01101101 -> 10000010

query: 10001011
predicted answer: 01101001
